category_sources: source_facts.description says UADE plays Amiga tunes through UAE emulation; official homepage https://zakalwe.fi/uade/
display_name_sources: Official homepage title and input source_facts.name identify the project as uade/UADE.
docs_sources: Official UADE homepage is the primary project information page; official download page documents source retrieval including Git.
repo_sources: Official UADE download page states to sync UADE sources with git clone https://gitlab.com/uade-music-player/uade.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables identify an Amiga tune player CLI using UAE emulation.
